output.code:
# Let's open the uploaded file and inspect its contents
path = "/mnt/data/file-X2Trz3YsYLvqzZGPKoSi5v-Q143.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

# Let's find all positions of double quote characters in the text
positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
positions, len(positions)

first_start = positions[0] + 1
first_end = positions[1]  # exclusive end index for quotes char
first_citation = text[first_start:first_end]
first_start, first_end, first_citation[:200], first_citation[-50:]

second_start = positions[2] + 1
second_end = len(text)  # since no closing quote, use end of file
second_citation = text[second_start:second_end]
second_start, second_end, second_citation

queries: إن الذين يحبون أن تشيع الفاحشة في الذين آمنوا لهم عذاب أليم
سورة النور 24:4 نص الآية والذين يرمون المحصنات
يا أيها الذين آمنوا لا تقربوا الصلاة وأنتم سكارى 4:43

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":459,"span_end":704,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَكْتُمُونَ الْفَحْشَاءَ مِنْهُمْ لَفِي الْعَذَابِ الْأَخِرَةِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ. وَإِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَكْتُمُونَ الْفَحْشَاءَ لَمَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالْإِنْسُ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ.","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ 	"sura_name":"", 	"sura_number":0, 	"aya_number":0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ 	"collection_name":"", 	"book_number":0, 	"hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":942,"span_end":991,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَقْرَبُوا الْ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":43},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَقْرَبُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَأَنْتُمْ سُكَارَىٰ حَتَّىٰ تَعْلَمُوا مَا تَقُولُونَ وَلَا جُنُبًا إِلَّا عَابِرِي سَبِيلٍ حَتَّىٰ تَغْتَسِلُوا ۚ وَإِنْ كُنْتُمْ مَرْضَىٰ أَوْ عَلَىٰ سَفَرٍ أَوْ جَاءَ أَحَدٌ مِنْكُمْ مِنَ الْغَائِطِ أَوْ لَامَسْتُمُ النِّسَاءَ فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا مَاءً فَتَيَمَّمُوا صَعِيدًا طَيِّبًا فَامْسَحُوا بِوُجُوهِكُمْ وَأَيْدِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَفُوًّا غَفُورًا","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
